description: IPAPAS, Inc. operates Korean fortune and astrology content services, including saju, compatibility, today’s fortune, and new-year fortune apps. Its website also advertises partnership/API access to that content for other apps and websites.
summary: ipapas.co.kr publicly advertises one HTTP API surface for fortune-content integrations, but no public endpoint, machine-readable spec, or authentication details are documented; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
